testcase.name: test_platform_super_admin_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter164_roles_permissions_redesign.py:62: in test_platform_super_admin_login assert r.status_code == 200, f"Login failed: {r.status_code} - {r.text}" E AssertionError: Login failed: 403 - {"detail":"This code is reserved for platform administration. Please use the Platform Admin login portal."} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
